metadata.name: Urmila
metadata.primary_role: Wife of Lakshmana / Princess of Mithila / Sister of Sita / The woman who slept for 14 years
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Princess of Mithila, younger sister of Sita)
metadata.divine_origin: Blessed by the goddess of sleep Nidra — she slept for 14 years so that Lakshmana could stay awake guarding Rama during the exile

timelines.context_description: Urmila stays behind in Ayodhya when Lakshmana follows Rama into exile. She takes on his share of sleep through divine blessing, sleeping for 14 continuous years so he can remain vigilant.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Soft golden complexion similar to Sita's but slightly warmer, with the pallor of prolonged sleep — beautiful but ghost-like in her eternal slumber
physical_appearance.height: Graceful, slightly shorter than Sita, delicate build
physical_appearance.build: Delicate and slender, ethereal in her 14-year sleep, her body sustained by divine grace, wasting but preserved by the goddess Nidra's blessing
physical_appearance.facial_features: Beautiful gentle face very similar to Sita's but softer and more delicate, closed eyes with long lashes casting shadows on pale cheeks, peaceful sleeping expression with a hint of sadness, rosebud lips slightly parted, face becoming thinner over the years
physical_appearance.hair: Long black hair spread around her like a dark halo on the pillow, undone and flowing, Sita-like in its beauty
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: She glows with a faint silvery aura of divine sleep, flowers placed by attendants remain fresh around her, her breathing is barely perceptible — she appears preserved in eternal youth

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Simple white silk sleeping garment, changed regularly by her attendants, a light silk shawl covering her
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Only her mangalsutra and wedding bangles — never removed during her sleep, they grow loose on her thinning wrists
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: None — she is in divine sleep

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Gentle and sweet when awake (brief moments) — speaks primarily through her silence and sacrifice
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Soft lyric soprano — delicate, sweet, barely above a whisper, dreamlike quality
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks rarely — when she does, her words carry the poetic weight of 14 years of dreams, speaks in verse about Lakshmana with tender longing
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Peaceful acceptance, deep sacrificial love, the quiet heroism of a woman whose epic contribution is her silence

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Hauntingly beautiful cinematic shot of Princess Urmila in divine sleep, age 22. Soft golden pallid complexion, beautiful peaceful sleeping face with closed eyes and long lashes. Long black hair spread like a dark halo around her on a white silk bed. Wearing a simple white silk garment, mangalsutra and wedding bangles. Lying on an ornate bed in a quiet palace chamber, fresh flowers surrounding her. Faint silvery aura of divine sleep. Soft moonlight through palace windows. 3D Pixar style, ethereal soft silver-gold lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A soft, delicate female lyric soprano voice, barely above a whisper. Sweet and dreamlike. Speaks in poetic verses about love and sacrifice. Age approximately 22 years.
